final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional product photography scene featuring a smartwatch on a marble surface (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 简约商务 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the smartwatch as the primary focal subject, with a coffee cup and notebook as supporting props on the marble surface
Subject: must include a smartwatch (one, hero product), a coffee cup (one), and a notebook (one)
Scene/backdrop: must include a marble tabletop surface
Lighting/mood: must be natural side lighting — exact light quality and shadow treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a clean, business-minimal direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium surface treatment emphasizing marble texture and product tactile quality — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must emphasize product texture and material quality as the visual priority
Avoid:
